Orthodox Christian Bible
Daily Readings Prayers Articles KJV Septuagint Search

The Orthodoxy App

Your complete Orthodox Christian companion.

Prayers, the Bible, the liturgical calendar, and the writings of the Church Fathers, all in one place. Built for prayer, Scripture, and the spiritual life.

Download on the App Store Read the Bible online ↓

Prayer library, calendar, and Bible included free. An optional subscription supports development.

Verse of the Day For God so loved the world… John 3:16

Everything for the daily life of faith

Daily Prayers

A full Orthodox prayer library: Morning & Evening Prayers, Liturgical Hymns, the Trisagion, Prayers for the Departed, Before Holy Communion, and more. Daily notifications take you straight into prayer.

Orthodox Study Bible

Read the full Orthodox Study Bible with easy chapter navigation. A new verse of the day greets you each morning, synced to your home and lock screen widgets.

Orthodox Calendar

A fully dynamic calendar that calculates Pascha every year and shows all major feasts, saints’ days, and fasting rules for every single day.

Church Fathers & Library

Study the lives of the Church Fathers, discover insights on spiritual warfare, learn what Orthodoxy teaches, and follow the complete Orthodox fasting guide.

Widgets

Home screen and lock screen widgets display your daily Bible verse. Tap to open directly to the verse of the day.

Get the app

Read the Bible online free, no app needed

The full text, searchable and linkable, right in your browser. Open to any chapter and verse.

KJV King James Version 1611 · Public Domain The 1611 Authorized Version. Public domain. The most widely read English Bible in history. Brenton Brenton's Septuagint 1851 · Public Domain Sir Lancelot C. L. Brenton's 1851 English translation of the Greek Septuagint - the Orthodox Old Testament, including Tobit, Judith, Wisdom, Sirach, Baruch, and 1–4 Maccabees.
Public-domain texts (KJV 1611, Brenton's Septuagint 1851). Also available as an iOS app.
